verdict_reason: Refresh delta resolves the prior toString secret-leak item and moves the queue into the EntityPath of the connection string consistently across client config, profiles and ITs; only a Minor gap remains (no test pinning the new toString redaction).

todos.issue: New toString() redaction (added to resolve item 9) has no test pinning it - if the override is removed the record silently reverts to the auto-generated toString that leaks the SAS connectionString
todos.fix: Add a one-assert unit test: new AzureServiceBusConfig("Endpoint=sb://x;SharedAccessKey=secret").toString() does not contain "secret"
